meta.title: DEF CON 33 - Gold Bug - Puzzle Panel with Friends - The Gold Bug Team 2025
meta.description: Psychoholics is a group of nerds that love solving puzzles, drinking drinks, and doing escape rooms. We love competing in contests and CTFs, and we also run TFH, Crash&Compile and Dungeons@Defcon. Oh, and we have a Krux. 110001011100001111101 100011100110001101101
